total_eur: 780

project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780

---

function.message: Processed the next inbox request and completed OCR-style structuring for all four listed finance records. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file and preserved each original note body verbatim beneath the frontmatter. Then deleted the processed inbox item per workflow.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, inspected 99_system before task work, used OCR workflow + finance schema, preserved original bodies exactly under new frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly listed four finance records for OCR workflow. The four target files were read, then updated with required invoice/bill frontmatter fields and line items derived from visible table data, with original content retained below frontmatter. This satisfies the OCR records workflow and finance frontmatter schema; inbox-processing v2 then required deleting the inbox task after successful completion.
